title: Manipur University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Manipur University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Manipur University Result 2026 Out for 3rd Semester BA (Philosophy, Education, Mass Communication), BSc 3rd Semester (Old Back) and BPES 3rd Semester Nov 2025 exams on the official website - manipuruniv.ac.in on 15-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Manipur University result.

content.text: Manipur University has released new Manipur University Result 2026 notifications for various 3rd semester undergraduate courses conducted in November 2025 under NEP and old schemes. The latest results include BA Philosophy 3rd Semester (NEP), Bachelor of Physical Education and Sports (BPES) 3rd Semester (NEP), BSc 3rd Semester (Old Back), BA Education 3rd Semester (NEP) and BA Mass Communication 3rd Semester (NEP). Manipur University Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - manipuruniv.ac.in through the dedicated exam results page manipuruniv.ac.in/exam_result and linked PDFs. Students can open the relevant PDF result links for their course and check roll number-wise marks and pass status for the 3rd semester November 2025 examinations. After downloading the provisional result, candidates should verify their name, roll number, subjects and marks, and contact the examination section if any discrepancy is found.

Manipur University continues to publish 3rd and 4th semester results for the 2024-25 and 2025 exam cycles, covering BA, BSc, BCom, BEd and BSW courses. On 15 April 2026, the university uploaded multiple 3rd semester November 2025 results under NEP and old back categories for BA Philosophy, Education, Mass Communication, BPES and BSc. These results are available as downloadable PDFs via the exam_result section, allowing students to quickly search their roll numbers and confirm their performance in the mid-programme semester.

Manipur University has activated direct PDF links for each newly declared 3rd semester result in the Exam Results section of its website. These PDFs provide roll number-wise results for BA Philosophy, BA Education, BA Mass Communication, BPES and BSc (old back) 3rd Semester November 2025 examinations. Students can use the links below to open and download their course-specific result PDFs for quick access.

sections.heading: Steps to Check Manipur University Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download Manipur University 3rd Semester Result 2026 online:

items: Visit the official Manipur University Exam Result page: https://www.manipuruniv.ac.in/exam_result.

Scroll through the list of latest results and locate the entries for your course, such as "Result of BA Philosophy 3rd Semester Examination, 2025 (Nov) (NEP)" or "Result of BSc 3rd Semester Exam 2025 Nov old back".
Click on the desired course result link to open the PDF file in a new tab.
Inside the PDF, use the search function (Ctrl+F) and type your roll number to quickly find your result row.
Check your subject-wise marks, total marks and pass/failed/backlog status as mentioned in the PDF.
Download or print the PDF result for your records and use it as a provisional marksheet for academic purposes.
In case of any discrepancy, withheld result or query, contact the Manipur University examination section or your college with your roll number and a copy of the result notice.
